question: What is the total amount of money I earned from selling my products at the markets?

retrieval_results.context:
User earned $150 from selling 20 potted herb plants at the Summer Solstice Market.
User sold 20 potted herb plants at the Summer Solstice Market for $7.5 each.
User sold 12 bunches of fresh organic herbs on May 15, earning $120.
User is considering herbal teas as a product for the Harvest Festival Market.
User is considering herb-infused oils as a product for the Harvest Festival Market.
User should monitor market trends and seasonal demand when setting prices for herbal teas and infused oils
User can set markup between 2 and 5 times production cost for herbal teas and infused oils
User can use cost-based pricing by calculating production costs and adding a markup for herbal teas and infused oils
User should consider target audience willingness to pay when determining prices for herbal teas and infused oils
User can use value-based pricing by setting prices based on perceived value to customers for herbal teas and infused oils
